3AW contributor Mark Allen has firmly pointed the blame on Australian selectors for taking Rachael “Raygun” Gunn to the Paris Olympics to compete in the breaking competition.

Raygun has since opened up on her now infamous performance in an inclusive interview on The Project during the week, and Allen said he feels sorry for her.

“If that’s the best that we can come up with, then that’s not good enough for a country like Australia,” Allen said.

Press PLAY to hear his full comments on Raygun + part of her interview on The Project



‘Feel sorry for her’: Mark Allen slams Australian selectors for taking Raygun to Olympics



Image (Raygun): Ezra Shaw/Getty

title: 'Feel sorry for her': Mark Allen slams Australian selectors for taking Raygun to Olympics
author: aocarroll
